name: Cinnamon Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter and 2 cups sugar until fluffy.
2. Add vanilla extract.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, soda, and salt; add alternately with sour cream, beating just enough after each addition to keep the batter smooth.
5. Spoon 1/3 of the batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan.
6. Combine cinnamon, nuts, and remaining sugar; sprinkle 1/3 over the batter in the pan.
7. Repeat layers two more times.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 70 minutes or until the cake tests done.
9. Cool for 10 minutes.
10. Remove from pan to a wire rack to cool completely.
